subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! When the Sun of Truth shone forth from the horizon of Hijaz, the people of metaphor rose up against Him. Among them were those who said [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اذا اشرقت شمس الحقیقه من افق الحجاز اعترض علیه اهل المجاز منهم من قال
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection of Muhammad, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
